name: Alignment Healthcare, Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Mission: Improve Healthcare, One Senior at a Time Alignment Healthcare was founded in 2013 with one mission: improve healthcare, one senior at a time. We pursue this mission by focusing on our core values: always put the senior first; support the doctor; use data and technology to revolutionize care; and act with a serving heart.
